name: Crock Pot Stuffed Peppers
recipeIngredient: 6 8 oz. small green and/or red peppers (tops removed and seeded)
1 cup shredded cheese (I use Cheddar or Swiss)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash peppers and drain well.
2. Combine all remaining ingredients except ketchup in a mixing bowl. Stir well.
3. Stuff peppers 2/3 full with the mixture.
4. Pour 3 tablespoons water into the crock pot.
5. Arrange stuffed peppers in the crock pot.
6. Pour ketchup over top of peppers.
7. Cover and cook on low for 7-9 hours or high for 3-4 hours.
